---
title: |
  R Analytics Platform
  Learning Project
format:
  okpolicy-website-template-html: default
number-sections: true
smooth-scroll: true
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.align: center
    echo: false
    message: false
    warning: false
title-block-banner: "#2f507f"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
fontcolor: "black"
linkcolor: "black"
description: |
  A personal learning project exploring modern R-based data engineering:
  targets pipelines, parquet/Arrow/DuckDB, reproducible environments,
  and automated deployment to GitHub Pages.
---

## About This Project

This is an educational R project that combines lessons from several internal
projects into a single, integrated learning environment. It demonstrates:

- **Pipeline orchestration** with `targets` — caching, reproducibility, dependency graphs
- **Modern data formats** — Parquet files queried with Arrow and DuckDB
- **Reproducible environments** — `renv` for R packages, Docker for system dependencies
- **Automated publishing** — Quarto website deployed via GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages
- **Cloud storage** — GCS-backed artifact persistence with Workload Identity Federation

## Reports

### [Eviction Trends](reports/eviction-trends/index.qmd)

* Year-over-year analysis of eviction filings in Tulsa County (2021–2025),
  exploring how volume has changed over time and what the trajectory suggests.

### [Geographic Patterns](reports/geographic-patterns/index.qmd)

* Spatial analysis of where eviction filings concentrate geographically,
  using geocoded court records to identify hotspot areas.

::: {.content-hidden when-profile="public"}
## Draft Notes

This section is only visible in draft renders. It won't appear when
the site is built with `QUARTO_PROFILE=public`.

### Architecture Notes

The project is structured as an R package with a `targets` pipeline that
produces parquet outputs consumed by Quarto report pages. The pipeline and
website share the same project root but are rendered independently:

- `targets::tar_make()` runs the data pipeline
- `quarto render` builds the website from pipeline outputs

### Work in Progress

Items under active development should be tracked here during the build.
:::

---

*Built as a learning project. See [docs/JOURNEY.md](docs/JOURNEY.md) for
the full build log.*
